almajd-news.expected_content_genre: Arabic news bulletin — studio set, male presenter in thobe, news chyrons, mosque/Islamic motifs in backgrounds, Al Majd logo top-left
almajd-news.expected_logo_description: Al Majd News — Arabic script logo top-left, green channel-number badge

hadith-almajd.expected_content_genre: Hadith lectures / Islamic study programs — scholars, sometimes mosque settings, Arabic text overlays
hadith-almajd.expected_logo_description: Al Majd Hadith — Arabic watermark top-right area
hadith-almajd.notes: Baseline captured from a washed-out frame; re-sample when confident channel is showing typical content.

almajd-quran.expected_content_genre: Quran recitation with on-screen Arabic verses over mosque/Islamic-art backgrounds, ornamental cards, Al Majd watermark
almajd-quran.expected_logo_description: Al Majd Quran — Arabic script logo top-left

almajd-kids.expected_content_genre: Children's programming — child presenters, colorful sets, animated segments, quiz/educational formats
almajd-kids.expected_logo_description: Al Majd Kids — green/colorful logo top-right corner

almajd-3aamah.expected_content_genre: General Al Majd programming — news, magazine shows, male presenters in thobe, studio sets, Arabic chyrons
almajd-3aamah.expected_logo_description: Al Majd General — Arabic logo top-left

natural.expected_content_genre: Nature documentary content — landscapes, plants, wildlife, water scenes, calm footage
natural.expected_logo_description: Al Majd Tabeeya — small Arabic logo top-right

daal.expected_content_genre: Children's content channel programming — colorful animated cards, kid-genre tiles, youth-oriented

maassah.expected_content_genre: Magazine/lifestyle show format — studio interiors, presenters, interior-design or culture segments

basmah.expected_content_genre: Children's animated programming — cartoon characters, Arabic-dubbed animation, kid-friendly sets
basmah.expected_logo_description: Al Majd Basma — colorful logo top-right with genre icons

ajaweed.expected_content_genre: Traditional Arab/Islamic cultural programs — majlis settings, male presenters in thobe, heritage themes
ajaweed.expected_logo_description: Al Majd Ajaweed — Arabic logo top-right

makkah.expected_content_genre: Live feed of Masjid al-Haram (Grand Mosque, Makkah) — wide crowd shots, Kaaba or Haram courtyard, often at night with lighting
makkah.expected_logo_description: MAKKAH TV — small channel bug, Arabic text bottom banner

rawdah.expected_content_genre: Child-oriented Quran recitation and Islamic education — colorful Surah cards with verses displayed over decorative backgrounds

sunnah.expected_content_genre: Live feed of Masjid al-Haram — similar to MAKKAH TV but a separate broadcast, often crisper/4K, Haram crowds and Kaaba

uthaymeen.expected_content_genre: Lectures by/about Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen — scholarly lectures, Arabic text cards with lecture titles, mosque or studio settings

arrahmah.expected_content_genre: Islamic call-in / lecture programs — presenters in natural/green-decorated sets, phone numbers on-screen, pink/floral motifs
arrahmah.expected_logo_description: Al Rahma — Arabic logo, call-in banners visible

almajd-islamic-science.expected_content_genre: Islamic education / quiz show format — green/teal studio sets, 'Sibaq al-Uqul' style programs
almajd-islamic-science.expected_logo_description: Al Majd EDU — Arabic logo top-left

mekkah-quran.expected_content_genre: Live feed of Masjid al-Haram, typically DAYTIME courtyard view with tawaf visible — distinct from MAKKAH TV by lighting/angle

nada.expected_content_genre: Studio lecture/talk show format — male presenter in suit, bookshelf or plain backdrop, single-camera speaking

anees.expected_content_genre: Al Anis TV programming — Islamic talk/lecture content. NOTE: frequently observed showing upstream maintenance slate 'البث سيعود بعد قليل إن شاء الله / Stream will return shortly' — this is NOT the Albunyaan slate, it's the upstream's own outage screen
anees.expected_logo_description: Al Anis TV — Arabic logo when live; upstream slate when down shows centered loader + bilingual 'Stream will return shortly' text on dark blue background
anees.notes: Upstream silent-swap to its own maintenance slate observed 2026-04-13. When thumbnail shows dark-blue 'Stream will return shortly' card, content is NOT live — treat as upstream outage even though segment_age reports healthy.

zaad.expected_content_genre: ZAD TV programming — Islamic lectures and educational content, outdoor/garden or studio settings, Arabic text overlays at bottom
zaad.expected_logo_description: ZAD TV — small logo, often muted/dimmed shots

almajd-documentary.expected_content_genre: Documentary programming — Arabic-language historical/biographical documentaries, narrated content, program cards
almajd-documentary.expected_logo_description: Al Majd Documentary — Arabic logo top-left

saad.expected_content_genre: Sheikh Saad channel programming — Quran recitation and Islamic content, ornate mosque-interior CGI/imagery, Quran-on-stand visuals common
